sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16203" key="a)/silla" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄσιλλα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n16203.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">yoke,</tr_> <abbr TEIform="abbr">like</abbr> that of a milk-man, to carry baskets, pails, etc., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:163" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">163</biblScope> </bibl>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἄ. ἐπωμίους ἀνελόμενοι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (prob.).</sense> </entryFree>
